title: 2025 05 21 Austin Move Plan
html:
TL;DR

  • May 2025 planning doc for Yahir's Austin scouting trip June 9–11, with the goal of touring 2BR apartments and locking a lease before his current Corvallis lease ends July 31.
  • Budget: $1,100/month rent for 2 people, ideally a 2BR. 1BR is "wildly difficult and depressing" given Yahir's no-job plan.
  • Income strategy: part-time personal training to cover bills; main work is for himself (early rankett/brotein motion).
  • Roommate uncertainty is the doc's biggest unresolved variable: cam jipp is on the fence, hung up on his girlfriend of 1 year whom he isn't even sure he wants to marry — Yahir frames Cam as "not thinking in reality."
  • Stated thesis: "to increase our surface area of luck — for business, for women, for life fulfillment." Companion 7-step deadline grid (Apr 16 → Late Aug move-in) included.

Notes

Tab 1 is voice-memo-energy: Yahir writing through the Cam-roommate problem in real time, pricing risk on Cam bailing and pivoting to a 1BR fallback. The line "Is there a chance it's miserable, maybe. Does it sound lit, yes" is the core sentiment that carries through the whole Austin thesis arc.

Tab 2 is a more structured 7-question decision matrix (Roommate Commitment, Budget Proof, Apartment Type, Lease Overlap, Backup, Income, Paperwork) with a date-banded timeline. Reads like Yahir asked an AI to formalize his earlier scratch-pad — same content, but actionable.

Surface-area-of-luck framing connects directly to the all in posture Yahir keeps articulating: he's not optimizing for comfort, he's optimizing for the density of unexpected upside.

Connections

  • the austin thesis — the larger arc this is one entry in
  • austin tx — destination entity
  • cam jipp — the roommate unresolved variable
  • brotein, rankett — the businesses Yahir wants to build there
  • no runway discipline — the framing for moving without a job
  • cam jipp pre rankett idea — the partnership prototype that this Austin pitch reactivates (without crypto)
